meta.source: PhilRice Abonong Swak, Fertilizer Derby, RCEF, and CtRH Carbonizer Programs

tiers.1: Ranked fertilizers — have per-seed compatibility rankings in philrice.json
tiers.2: Unranked fertilizers — used as last-resort fallbacks grouped by nutrient_role

nutrient_roles.npk_foliar: Water-soluble foliar NPK for rapid leaf absorption
nutrient_roles.soil_conditioner: Improves soil structure, biology, or water retention

fertilizers.name: Urea (46-0-0)
fertilizers.description: Primary nitrogen source; promotes tillering, leaf area, and grain protein content

fertilizers.name: Complete (14-14-14)
fertilizers.description: Balanced complete fertilizer for early establishment and uniform tillering

fertilizers.name: Ammonium Sulfate (21-0-0)
fertilizers.description: N + S source; effective in alkaline soils; boosts grain protein and enzyme activity

fertilizers.name: Muriate of Potash (0-0-60)
fertilizers.description: Strengthens stalks, improves disease resistance, milling quality and grain filling

fertilizers.name: Biofertilizer (Liquid Concentrate)
fertilizers.description: Brassinosteroid, triacontanol, Fe, K₂O, Cu, Zn, Vitamins B1/B2/B6; promotes root growth, stress tolerance and grain set

fertilizers.name: Nanobiofertilizer
fertilizers.description: N, phosphate, soluble K, algae, bacteria, fungi, sea kelp, humic & fulvic acids; nano-scale delivery for enhanced uptake

fertilizers.name: Organic Root Exudate Mix
fertilizers.description: Organic materials + root fluids; activates beneficial soil microbes and improves rhizosphere nutrient availability

fertilizers.name: Azolla microphylla
fertilizers.description: Water fern that fixes 20–30 kg N/ha; used as green manure in flooded paddies to reduce synthetic N needs

fertilizers.name: Foliar Liquid Fertilizer (NPK)
fertilizers.description: Water-soluble NPK for direct leaf absorption; corrects mid-season deficiency within 48–72 hrs; bypasses soil fixation
Phosphorus-rich basal fertilizer for root development and early establishment; use when primary phosphorus source is unavailable

fertilizers.name: Zinc Sulfate
fertilizers.description: Corrects zinc deficiency; applied in seedbed or as basal; improves plant metabolism

fertilizers.name: Vermicompost
fertilizers.description: Organic soil amendment; improves soil structure, microbial activity and water retention; last-resort nitrogen fallback

fertilizers.name: Chicken Manure
fertilizers.description: Organic N-P-K source; improves soil fertility, biology and water retention; last-resort nitrogen fallback

fertilizers.name: Rice Straw (incorporated)
fertilizers.description: Potassium source; incorporated after harvest for slow decomposition and K recycling; last-resort potassium fallback

fertilizers.name: Carbonized Rice Hull (CRH)
fertilizers.description: PhilRice CtRH Carbonizer biochar; improves drainage, soil pH buffer and water retention; soil conditioner fallback

fallback_rules.description: When a Tier 1 fertilizer is in shortage, follow this resolution order

resolution_order.action: Walk down the seed's fertilizer_compatibility list in philrice.json and suggest the next available Tier 1 fertilizer
If all Tier 1 fertilizers for that nutrient_role are unavailable, suggest Tier 2 fertilizers with the same nutrient_role as a last resort
If no match exists in the same nutrient_role, flag the shortage as unresolvable and alert the system operator
